# @bubble-design-system/ui

> Token-driven React component library on Base UI. 25 components, soft+teal "floating pill" aesthetic, single CSS import (`@bubble-design-system/ui/styles.css`), 7-axis live runtime theming via `data-theme` / `data-tone` / `data-gray` / `data-brand` / `data-radius` / `data-density` / `data-font`.

## Rule #1

If you're about to write `var(--color-bg-*)`, `var(--radius-*)`, or `var(--shadow-*)` on a hand-rolled element to build a surface, pill, banner, menu, or dialog — stop and check the table below. It is very likely already a component.

## Pattern → Component

| Need | Component |
| --- | --- |
| Floating card / panel / content surface | `Card` |
| Chat message thread (bubbles, avatars, timestamps, reactions, compose bar) | `Chat` (`ChatThread`, `ChatMessage`, `ChatCompose`, `ChatDateDivider`) |
| Notification / toast / status banner | `Toast` + `useToast()` |
| Status dot (online/connected/error) | `StatusPill` |
| Tag / count / label pill | `Badge` |
| Dropdown / context menu | `DropdownMenu` |
| "/" command menu / ⌘K palette | `CommandPalette` + `useCommandPalette()` |
| Anchored popover | `Popover` |
| Hover tooltip | `Tooltip` |
| Loading placeholder | `Skeleton` |
| Segmented toggle / view switcher | `Segmented` |
| Confirm dialog / modal | `Modal` |
| Responsive grid / page section | `Container`, `Grid` |
| Tabbed interface | `Tabs` |
| Sortable/searchable/paginated table | `DataTable` |
| Rule / separator | `Divider` |
| Avatar with fallback | `Avatar` |
| Form fields | `Input`, `Textarea`, `Checkbox`, `Radio`/`RadioGroup`, `Switch`, `Select` |

## Full component list (25)

Alert, Avatar, Badge, Button, Card, Chat, Checkbox, CommandPalette, Container, DataTable, Divider, DropdownMenu, Grid, Input, Modal, Popover, Radio, RadioGroup, Segmented, Select, Skeleton, StatusPill, Switch, Tabs, Textarea, Toast, Tooltip

## Setup

```tsx
import "@bubble-design-system/ui/styles.css";
import { Button, Card } from "@bubble-design-system/ui";
```

Set theme attributes on `<html>`: `data-theme="light|dark"`, `data-tone="soft|vivid|pastel"`, `data-gray="slate|neutral|stone"`, `data-brand="teal|blue|violet|emerald|orange|mono"`, `data-radius="default|sharp|soft|pill"`, `data-density="default|compact|comfortable"`, `data-font="roboto|system"`.

## Full docs

See `README.md` in this package for props tables, design tokens, and per-component examples.
